titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Burkina Faso Collection
titlestmt.author: compiled by Carol King, Nancy Lyon and staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday September 2, 2020 at 09:17

descriptivenote.p: The materials are in English and French.

did.abstract: The collection consists of printed material and photographs relating to cultural, political, and social conditions in Burkina Faso.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Transferred from the African Collection Curator.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Burkina Faso Collection (MS 1505). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: Associated Materials
relatedmaterial.p: African Collection (MS 605); Pamphlet Collection (MS 1351); African Postcard Collection (MS 1575). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The materials are arranged by accession.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of printed material and photographs relating to cultural, political, and social conditions in Burkina Faso.

did.unittitle: Political organizations: journals; press releases; magazines; printed materials
Non-political organizations: journals; newsletters; printed materials
Institute of Current World Affairs: newsletters
Centre d'Études Économiques et Sociales d'Afrique Occidentale (CESAO) Collection "La Vie Civique"
Direction de la Gestion et de l'Animation des Salles de Spectacles (DGASS), programme
FESPACO (Festival,14th, Panafricain du Cinéma et de la Télévision de Ouagadougou), brochure

title.part: Kibaré: Organe d'Information du Burkina Faso, no. 32

did.unittitle: Parti Pour l'Unité National et le Développement (P.U.N.D.), "Statuts et Manifest"
Movement Communiste International (MCI), Union de Lutte Communiste (ULC)
SIAO 2002 (Salon International de l'Artisanat de Ouagadougou), "African Handicraft and Environment"
"Visages d'Afrique: Organe Culturel du Cercle d'Activités Littéraires et Artistiques de Haute-Volta," special edition and no. 8
Minisère de la Défense Populaire: Bulletin mensuel d'information No. 005
West African Economic and Monetary Union (UEMOA) flyer
